productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Casual Green Casual Shoes
description: An eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and leather upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.UpperCanvas upper with a perforated leather panel on the forefoot and sides of the mouth for absolute breathable comfortPerforated leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and impact-protectionLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleEVA midsole for absolute impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves on the medial side and brick-styled grooves on the lateral side for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the leather patches with a clean, damp clothTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
